## Source: kam193 (448ec8ad7c978d60f142f12780be3bb6ae7b90870fa4c2bf2d50ca7d4111cdfd)
This package is prepared to perform steganography decoding using the same code and was published on the same day as package 'rasterkit,' later used to deliver malicious payload.


---

Category: MALICIOUS - The campaign has clearly malicious intent, like infostealers.
